projectDescription: A web application for automating all the manual effort on automation testing.
projectFeatures: Hierarchical folder system for organizing test cases
Sprint and phase management for agile workflows
Multiple dashboard views including Kanban, Card, Split and List
Complete CRUD operations for test cases, bugs and reports
Import and export features for backup and migration
AI-powered test generation from Selenium automation scripts
Automatic bug creation from failed test cases
projectOverview:
CafeTest is a comprehensive bug tracking and test management platform designed to automate and streamline software testing workflows. The application integrates modern full stack technologies with AI capabilities to simplify how QA teams manage projects, test cases, bugs, and reports. By combining structured test management with intelligent automation, CafeTest eliminates repetitive manual effort and improves testing efficiency.

The platform includes enterprise-grade capabilities such as role-based access control, project organization, sprint planning, and flexible dashboards. It also integrates AI APIs to automatically generate test cases from Selenium automation scripts and identify failures as bugs. With features like real-time synchronization, collaborative messaging, documentation support, and detailed reporting dashboards, CafeTest acts as a centralized platform for developers, testers, and project managers.
projectKeyFeatures:
AI Test Case Generation from Selenium Scripts
Role-Based Access Management
Multi-view Dashboard (Kanban, Split, Card, List)
Real-time Auto-save with Keystroke Detection
Built-in Messaging & Collaboration
Theme Customization (Dark/Light/System)
VS Code Extension Integration
Import/Export & Sharing Features
projectTimeLine:
Planning & Research - Architecture design and feature planning
Phase 1 Development - Core backend APIs and database structure
Phase 2 Development - Frontend UI, dashboard views, and test management system
Phase 3 Integration - AI APIs, messaging system, and automation workflows
Deployment - Production deployment using Vercel and Render
projectStandOutFeatures: The most unique feature of CafeTest is the VS Code extension integration that leverages Anthropic AI APIs to automatically generate test cases from Selenium automation scripts. It also detects failures during execution and categorizes them as bugs, significantly reducing manual effort in test creation and bug reporting. This makes CafeTest far more intelligent than traditional tools such as Jira and Zephyr.
projectChallenges:
Designing a scalable test case management structure for large projects
Implementing real-time auto-save and synchronization without performance issues
Integrating AI APIs for automated test generation
Building multiple dashboard views with dynamic data handling
Creating a seamless workflow between test execution and bug tracking
projectLessonsLearned:
Improved understanding of scalable full-stack architecture
Learned advanced state management and real-time data handling
Experience integrating AI APIs into practical developer workflows
Deepened knowledge of automation testing workflows and bug management systems
Enhanced UI/UX design for complex dashboard applications
projectFuturePlans:
Add CI/CD integration for automated testing pipelines
Introduce AI-powered bug prioritization and severity prediction
Add advanced analytics dashboards with predictive insights
Integrate additional automation frameworks like Cypress and Playwright
Develop a desktop version using Electron

projectOverview: Resolution Pro is a full stack collaboration platform designed to simplify document sharing, meeting management, and organizational communication. The application enables teams to upload, manage, and share documents securely while maintaining structured meeting records and collaboration workflows. It integrates AI-powered capabilities to provide intelligent insights, automate document processing, and enhance productivity. Built using modern web technologies, the platform focuses on scalability, security, and seamless user experience for enterprise-level collaboration.

projectDescription: A complete e-commerce platform designed for jewelry businesses with product management, inventory tracking, secure user access, and integrated sales management.
projectFeatures: Complete e-commerce platform for jewelry products
Inventory tracking and stock management system
Secure authentication and role-based access control
Admin dashboard with analytics and reports
Product image upload and media management
Responsive UI for seamless user shopping experience
projectOverview: Mega Jewelers is a full stack e-commerce platform built specifically for jewelry businesses to manage their digital storefront, inventory, and sales operations. The platform enables administrators to manage products, track inventory levels, process customer orders, and monitor business performance through a centralized dashboard. Customers can browse jewelry collections, view product details, and place orders through a clean and intuitive interface. The system ensures secure authentication, efficient product management, and scalable architecture for growing businesses.
projectKeyFeatures:
Product Catalog Management
Inventory Tracking System
Secure Authentication and Role-Based Access
Integrated Order and Sales Management
Admin Dashboard with Analytics
Image Upload and Media Storage
Responsive Shopping Interface
projectTimeLine:
Planning & Requirement Analysis - Understanding e-commerce and jewelry business requirements
Phase 1 Development - Backend APIs and database schema design
Phase 2 Development - Frontend UI and product catalog implementation
Phase 3 Integration - Authentication, order management, and inventory system
Deployment - Application deployment using Vercel and Render
projectStandOutFeatures: Mega Jewelers stands out by combining e-commerce functionality with a powerful inventory and sales management system tailored specifically for jewelry businesses. The platform provides administrators with detailed insights into product performance, inventory levels, and sales activities through a centralized dashboard.

Designing scalable product and inventory database structures

Enhanced frontend architecture for dynamic product displays
projectFuturePlans:

projectDescription: A task and resource management platform designed for project allocation, workforce management, and operational tracking with integrated access control and collaboration tools.
projectFeatures: Project allocation and tracking across teams
Workman and staff assignment to specific tasks
Full CRUD operations for tasks, projects, and staff

projectOverview: Rr Crop is a full stack task and workforce management platform designed to handle complex project allocations and team coordination. The system enables administrators to create projects, assign tasks, allocate workers, and track project progress in real time. It provides structured management of staff, resources, and project timelines through an intuitive dashboard interface. The platform focuses on improving productivity by providing centralized control over project planning, task distribution, and workforce management while ensuring secure access and scalable performance.

Project Allocation and Management
Task Scheduling and Tracking
Workforce and Staff Assignment
Role-Based Access Control
Real-Time Project Monitoring Dashboard
Team Collaboration Features
Resource and Task Analytics

Phase 2 Development - Frontend dashboard and task management interface

The system enables organizations to efficiently distribute work among team members, monitor task progress, and manage resources through centralized dashboards and structured project workflows.

projectDescription: Comprehensive end-to-end testing infrastructure for the PISL web application including UI, API, performance, and security testing with advanced visualization and reporting.
projectFeatures: API automation testing with structured test suites
projectOverview: PISL Infra is a complete automation and testing infrastructure designed to validate the reliability, performance, and security of the PISL web application. The system integrates UI testing, API testing, load testing, and security testing into a unified framework. Using modern tools like K6 and Grafana, it enables real-time performance monitoring while generating detailed and visually rich reports through custom SVG visualization. The project ensures that backend services, APIs, and user interfaces operate efficiently under real-world conditions while maintaining security and scalability.
projectKeyFeatures:
End-to-End UI Automation Testing
API Automation Testing
Performance Testing with K6
Security Testing and Vulnerability Detection
Real-time Grafana Dashboards
Custom SVG Performance Reports
Automated Test Execution Pipelines
Comprehensive Performance Analytics
projectTimeLine:
Phase 1 - Testing Strategy and Framework Design
Phase 2 - UI and API Automation Test Development
Phase 3 - Performance Testing Integration with K6
Phase 4 - Grafana Dashboard and Monitoring Setup
Phase 5 - Security Testing and Report Generation
Deployment - Automated test execution and reporting setup
projectStandOutFeatures: The most unique aspect of PISL Infra is its custom SVG-based performance reporting system that transforms complex performance metrics into visually rich and interactive reports. Combined with live Grafana dashboards and automated testing pipelines, the system provides a complete view of application health and performance.
projectChallenges:
Designing a unified framework for UI, API, performance, and security testing
Integrating real-time monitoring with test execution
Generating visually rich performance reports using SVG
Handling large volumes of performance test data
Ensuring accurate metrics collection during high load conditions
projectLessonsLearned:
Gained deep expertise in performance engineering and load testing
Learned to design scalable automation frameworks
Improved understanding of application performance monitoring
Developed advanced reporting and data visualization techniques
projectFuturePlans:
Integrate CI/CD pipelines for automated performance testing
Add AI-based anomaly detection for performance metrics
Expand security testing automation
Develop advanced analytics dashboards for long-term performance tracking

projectDescription: Multi-layered end-to-end testing infrastructure for Resolution Pro including UI automation, API testing, performance testing, and enterprise-level QA strategy implementation.
projectFeatures: Test data management using Google Sheets and Zoho Sheets
projectOverview: Resolution Pro testing infrastructure provides a comprehensive QA framework designed to ensure reliability, security, and performance across the entire application. The testing system integrates manual testing, automation testing, API validation, and performance testing into a unified workflow. Built using modern automation frameworks like Playwright and Cucumber with Page Object Model architecture, the system ensures maintainable and scalable testing processes. Detailed HTML reports, structured test data management, and integration with defect tracking systems provide complete visibility into application quality and test coverage.

BDD Framework using Cucumber
Playwright UI Automation
API Testing with Rest Assured
Page Object Model Architecture
Custom HTML Test Reports
Access Control and User Management Testing
AI Feature Validation
Real-time Collaboration Workflow Testing

Phase 2 - Manual Functional Testing and Requirement Validation
Phase 3 - UI Automation Framework using Playwright and Cucumber
Phase 4 - API Automation Testing using Rest Assured
Phase 5 - Reporting System and Test Data Management Integration
Execution - Continuous regression and automated test execution
projectStandOutFeatures: The testing infrastructure stands out due to its BDD-based automation architecture combined with Playwright UI testing and Rest Assured API validation. The framework provides scalable automation, structured test case management, and detailed reporting through custom HTML dashboards for better visibility into application quality.

Designing scalable automation frameworks for large applications
Maintaining reusable Page Object Model architecture

projectFuturePlans:

projectDescription: End-to-end testing infrastructure for MegaJewelers including UI automation, API testing, performance testing, and enterprise-grade QA strategy for a complete e-commerce platform.
projectFeatures: Comprehensive UI automation testing using Selenium
Page Object Model architecture for scalable automation
Test data management using Google Sheets and Zoho Sheets
Enterprise-level test execution and defect tracking
projectOverview: Mega Jewelers testing framework provides a comprehensive end-to-end testing infrastructure for a large-scale e-commerce platform designed for jewelry businesses. The framework integrates UI automation, API validation, performance testing, and manual functional testing to ensure the reliability and scalability of the application. Using Selenium automation with Cucumber BDD architecture and Page Object Model design, the testing framework ensures maintainable and reusable test automation. Performance testing with Artillery validates system behavior during peak traffic periods while API testing with PyTest guarantees backend data integrity and system stability.
projectKeyFeatures:
BDD Framework with Cucumber
Selenium UI Automation
Page Object Model Architecture
PyTest API Testing
Artillery Performance Testing
Custom HTML/CSS/JS Test Reports
Inventory & Sales Management Testing
Access Control and Security Validation
projectTimeLine:
Phase 1 - QA strategy planning and test case design
Phase 2 - Manual functional and exploratory testing
Phase 3 - Selenium automation framework implementation
Phase 4 - API automation testing using PyTest
Phase 5 - Performance testing with Artillery
Execution - Continuous regression testing and reporting
projectStandOutFeatures: The standout aspect of this testing framework is its integration of Selenium automation, API testing using PyTest, and load testing with Artillery to validate the application under real-world conditions. Custom interactive reports provide clear insights into system reliability, performance metrics, and automation coverage.
projectChallenges:
Automating complex e-commerce workflows including checkout and payments
Handling dynamic UI elements during Selenium automation
Managing large test datasets for product inventory and order processing
Ensuring accurate performance metrics during load testing

Developed strong expertise in testing complex e-commerce platforms
Improved understanding of automation architecture using Page Object Model
Learned advanced API testing strategies using PyTest
Enhanced skills in performance testing and scalability analysis
projectFuturePlans:

Add advanced security testing modules
Develop real-time analytics dashboards for test results
Introduce AI-driven anomaly detection in testing workflows

Using Cypress automation combined with Page Object Model architecture and BDD practices, the test suites validate complex workflows such as project allocation, workman assignment, and team collaboration. API testing using Postman ensures accurate backend communication, while performance testing with JMeter validates system scalability under heavy workloads.

Combined with Postman API validation and JMeter performance testing, it ensures the system operates reliably even under heavy operational loads.
